description_long: This is a modern, rounded lounge chair with a plush, light gray upholstered seat and a high, curved backrest that wraps partially around the sitter for added comfort. The chair features three slender, cylindrical legs in a metallic gold finish, giving it a contemporary and slightly luxurious appearance. The seat is wide and circular, providing ample sitting space, while the backrest curves smoothly to support the lower and mid-back. The upholstery appears to be a soft, matte fabric with a plain texture, contributing to a cozy and inviting look. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing its minimalist and open design. Its overall aesthetic is well-suited for stylish urban interiors, such as lobbies, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern, rounded lounge chair with light gray upholstery, a curved backrest, and three gold metal legs. The seat is wide and plush, with a minimalist, armless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, circular seat, curved backrest, and two visible gold legs.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the continuous curve of the backrest and the third gold leg.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full curvature of the backrest and all three gold legs.
description_view_3: Side three-quarter view showing the depth of the seat and the smooth transition between seat and backrest.
